findings.message: base.yml interpolates ${APP_WIDGET_API_URL} for the app service, but APP_WIDGET_API_URL is not declared in .env.example (and has no corresponding APP_-prefixed pydantic field in src/demo/config/settings.py). A ${APP_*} interpolation with no .env.example declaration breaks env-var parity: the variable resolves to empty across dev/test (and anywhere it gets wired), with no documented source of truth for what value each environment should supply.
findings.suggestion: Add an APP_WIDGET_API_URL entry to the framework-managed block of .env.example documenting its expected value per environment (and, if the app actually consumes it, add a matching widget_api_url field under the APP_ prefix in src/demo/config/settings.py so the name maps cleanly).
